items.summary: Save the uploaded yellow-to-red polygonal low-poly geometric artwork image (quality_restoration_20260224213607352.jpg) as the new hero background static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png, replacing the existing file. Update the HeroSection component to use this new image as its full-screen background, maintaining the existing dark overlay so all text and CTA elements remain fully readable on top.
